name: Greenbean Mushroom Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds fresh green beans, cleaned, cut into 1 1/2 inch pieces
5 or 10 cloves garlic, minced or smashed
generous amount of freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or Dutch oven, pour in the red wine and heat over medium.
2. Add the green beans, mushrooms, onion, garlic, basil, marjoram, and black pepper.
3. Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the crushed tomatoes (or fresh sauce if available) and let simmer for an additional 30 minutes or until ready to serve.
5. Cook the pasta in salt-free, oil-free water according to package instructions.
6. Drain the pasta and combine with the vegetables and sauce.
7. Serve hot and enjoy this extra special meal.
